title: Lesson 212: 万, 万, 万年筆...

items.gloss: 10,000; ten thousand; myriad; everything; all; various
to polish; to shine; to brush (e.g. teeth); to grind (e.g. lens); to refine (e.g. a skill); to improve; to cultivate
